subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #064 The Station of Man and His Progress after Death
subcodes.first_line: When we examine all things with the eye of discernment, we observe that they are generally confined to three categories
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون در کائنات ببصر بصیرت نظر کنیم ملاحظه شود که محصور در سه قسم است
subcodes.subjects: @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @soul; spirit after death, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @arcs of ascent and descent, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @differences in human capacity, @man is the sum; pinnacle; fruit of creation, @spiritual transformation, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar]
